message:
fix: cache race hardening, deep-copy snapshot tree, CLI flag validation

Cache / XFetch fixes (correlation, analysis, search):
- XFetch: guard against immediately refreshing a freshly-written entry by
  requiring at least one compute-duration window has elapsed before
  ShouldRefresh can fire (pkg/analysis/cache.go)
- CachedCorrelator: inject shouldRefreshFn for testability; clone inputs
  before spawning background goroutine; check cache freshness inside the
  flight before re-computing; use cacheReportIfCurrent to drop stale writes
  (pkg/correlation/cache.go)
- metricsCache: switch singleflight key to a fixed constant so concurrent
  goroutines coalesce on the same flight; re-hash inside the flight for a
  correct double-check; clone issues on AnalyzerMetricsLoader construction
  to avoid aliasing; fix empty-issue hash to use ComputeDataHash instead
  of the literal "empty" (pkg/search/metrics_cache_impl.go)

Snapshot / pool correctness:
- deepCopyTree: new helper that fully copies TreeRoots + TreeNodeMap,
  rebinding issue pointers so WithPhase2 snapshots are detached from the
  original (pkg/ui/snapshot.go)
- BackgroundWorker.Stop: return pooled issues to the pool before clearing
  the snapshot to prevent use-after-free (pkg/ui/background_worker.go)
- pool.DeepCopyIssueSlices: copy nil-but-non-empty slices (len==0, cap>0)
  to shed pooled backing-array capacity (pkg/loader/pool.go)

CLI validation (cmd/bv/main.go):
- Add validateEnumFlags for --graph-format and --script-format
- Add validateExclusivePrimaryCommands to reject conflicting robot commands
- Add robot_registry entries for new robot flags

Tests: comprehensive coverage for all cache fixes, snapshot deep-copy,
background worker lifecycle, pool edge cases, and e2e robot validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -923,8 +923,11 @@ func getRobotDiskCachedStats(fullKey string) (stats *GraphStats, xfetchRefresh b
 		return nil, false, false
 	}
 
-	// XFetch: probabilistically suggest early refresh to prevent cache stampedes
+	// XFetch: probabilistically suggest early refresh to prevent cache stampedes.
+	// Do not refresh again before at least one prior compute-duration window has
+	// elapsed, otherwise newly written entries can get selected immediately.
 	shouldXFetchRefresh := entry.ComputeDuration > 0 &&
+		!now.Before(entry.CreatedAt.Add(entry.ComputeDuration)) &&
 		xfetch.ShouldRefresh(entry.CreatedAt, entry.ComputeDuration, 1.0, now)
 
 	entry.AccessedAt = now.UTC()
